narrative.headline: What 2015 Dodge Journey owners report most
narrative.summary: Engine and electrical system faults are the most frequently reported issues, with owners describing warning lights, violent shaking, and difficulty shifting gears. Brake-related complaints include sudden vehicle stalls at low speed, and seat component failures involve cracking plastic that traps seat belts or exposes sharp metal edges. Fires and crashes appear across multiple complaint categories, indicating some incidents escalated beyond warning lights alone.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report the check engine warning light illuminating alongside violent vehicle shaking, prompting dealer visits for diagnosis. · 1 fire · 3 crash · 2 injured

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report the service engine and traction control warning lights flashing simultaneously with difficulty shifting the gear selector out of drive. · 5 fire · 3 crash · 2 injured

issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle dying suddenly while decelerating at low speed, requiring the driver to steer off the road to stop safely. · 9 crash · 11 injured

issues.title: Seats
issues.blurb: Owners report plastic trim around seat belt anchors cracking and breaking, causing seat belts to become trapped in the cracked material and exposing sharp metal edges on middle-row seats. · 1 fire · 1 crash · 14 injured
